violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
Sponges were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
Inspector observed adulterated cheese(mold) stored in refrigerator.PIC voluntarily disposed of cheese. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and pizza paddle) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
Observed ice bucket with scoop being hung on the mop sink.PIC removed scoop and bucket. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: 1.shelves in the kitchen have food debris 2.shelves and counters in bar area have an accumulation of dust, soil residue and rodent dropping. 3.stoves in the kitchen have an accumalution of food residue and grease. 4.hoods in kitchen observed with dust and grease. 5.door curtains in walk in storage area have biofilm and soil residue 6.ice machine filter has an accumulation of dust. 7.handwashing sink faucet knobs have an accumulation of soil and food residue New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
The door in the front entrance is in poor repair(observed cracks). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

The walls throughout the kitchen, bar, and back walk in storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and grease The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

The floors throughout the kitchen, bar, and walk in storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
